title: CSS Design Refresh for Metrics Glossary Side Pane
story: As a DataTools Pro user working in the Metrics Glossary, I want the side pane to have a cleaner, more consistent design, so that editing and viewing metric details feels more polished.
description:
Design refinements to the Metrics Glossary side pane (detail/edit panel) for improved visual consistency and readability. Product owner experimented with CSS tweaks and provided updated styles to the developer for implementation.

## Changes
- Updated CSS for the Metrics side pane to improve layout consistency
- Design tweaks for better visual flow and readability
acceptance_criteria: Metrics Glossary side pane displays with updated CSS styling
Layout is consistent with other side panes in the application
Design changes do not introduce regressions in functionality
ux_changes: CSS refresh for the Metrics Glossary side pane — improved layout consistency, typography, and visual flow.
implementation_notes: Product owner provided CSS updates after experimenting with design tweaks. Developer applied the CSS changes iteratively with staging reviews.
comment_summary: Developer applied CSS updates in stages, shared screenshots for review. Product owner approved the final design enthusiastically.
